title: Historian trend on virt-cluster (UI)
prompt: Enable historian on a sineWave lab variable and add a chart widget to the virt-cluster overview dashboard so I can see trends in Operator mode.
uiJourney: Explorer → variable history → Dashboard chart → Operator
humanSteps: In Explorer, open the sineWave (or virt-cluster) variable and enable history.
Open the virt-cluster overview dashboard; add a chart widget bound to that history; save.
Open Operator mode and confirm the trend updates.
